parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam participantPadding 20

participant snap

box "SnapHelper" #LightBlue
participant "OnFlingListener" as OnFlingListener << (C,#ADD1B2) >>
participant "OnScrollListener" as OnScrollListener << (C,#ADD1B2) >>
participant "SnapHelper" as SnapHelper << (C,#ADD1B2) >>
participant "LinearSmoothScroller" as LinearSmoothScroller << (C,#ADD1B2) >>
end box

activate snap #FFC0CB

OnFlingListener --> OnFlingListener : onFling
OnFlingListener -> SnapHelper : snapFromFling
SnapHelper -> snap : findTargetSnapPosition
SnapHelper -> LinearSmoothScroller : createSnapScroller
LinearSmoothScroller --> SnapHelper : onTargetFound
SnapHelper -> snap : calculateDistanceToFinalSnap

OnScrollListener --> OnScrollListener : onScrollStateChanged
OnScrollListener -> SnapHelper : snapToTargetExistingView
SnapHelper -> snap : findSnapView
SnapHelper -> snap : calculateDistanceToFinalSnap

deactivate snap
@enduml
```
